entries.title: Session Summary - Norse Agents & Android OTA Updates
entries.content:
## Accomplishments

### Thor Agent
- Created comprehensive SOUL.md for Thor (trading executor agent)
- Defined trading workflow, risk management, circuit breakers
- Added Tyr strategy wall and Njord treasury wall isolation
- Created SKILL.md with invocation commands

### Android OTA Updates
- Built complete OTA update system for OpenClaw Android app
- Created /api/app-version endpoint with changelog and version tracking
- Added UpdateChecker.kt with fallback URLs (gateway → Tailscale → local)
- Integrated update check into SettingsSheet with progress UI
- Created /download page on The Hub for APK downloads

### Android App Improvements
- Fixed update checker connection issues (localhost → multi-URL fallback)
- Changed app icon to Spectre avatar with Norse dark theme background
- Added OpenClaw Updates section in Settings
- Version tracking via android-version.json

### Cron Jobs
- Created daily-journal-entry cron (midnight CDT)
- Created android-build-check cron (3 AM CDT)
- Updated morning-briefing to include journal scan
- Updated cron-health-monitor to check all 13 crons

### The Hub Enhancements
- Added Tailscale IP to all external links
- Added Download link to sidebar navigation
- Created server-config.ts for centralized URL management

## Key Decisions
- Thor cannot change strategy (Tyr domain)
- Thor cannot access fund tracking (Njord domain)
- Update checker tries gateway → Tailscale → local IPs in order
- Version tracking moved to JSON file for accuracy

## Bot Activity
- XRP bot running (paper mode)
- All systems healthy

## Git Changes
- agents/thor/SOUL.md (created)
- agents/thor/SKILL.md (updated)
- openclaw-repo/apps/android/app/.../update/UpdateChecker.kt (created)
- openclaw-repo/apps/android/app/.../MainViewModel.kt (updated)
- openclaw-repo/apps/android/app/.../ui/SettingsSheet.kt (updated)
- openclaw-repo/apps/android/app/.../res/values/colors.xml (updated icons)
- thehub/src/app/api/app-version/route.ts (created)
- thehub/src/app/download/page.tsx (created)
- thehub/src/components/Sidebar.tsx (updated)
- thehub/src/lib/server-config.ts (created)

## Next Steps
- Test OTA update flow on device
- Configure other Norse agents (Huginn, Tyr, Sindri, Njord, Mimir)
- Wire Heimdall coordinator for agent orchestration
